entries.theme: AI tools for structured thinking and productivity
entries.description: Multiple newsletters covering Claude/AI tools not just for output speed but for improving judgment and structured thinking (Socratic Explorer, Brutal Critic, Pre-Mortem). AI gains are more modest than expected due to SDLC bottlenecks. Now extending to AI style guides for voice consistency.

entries.theme: Externalising tacit knowledge with AI agents
entries.description: The idea of encoding expert knowledge into AI agents (CLAUDE.md, knowledge bases, style guides) so it doesn't live only in one person's head — seen in both Platform PM and agile/engineering contexts.

Themes around overcoming self-limiting beliefs (spotlight effect), navigating performance reviews, building leadership skills in an AI-changed landscape, FDE role desirability, and AI-driven layoffs reshaping org structures.

entries.theme: AI agents disrupting open source workflows
entries.description: AI agents autonomously spamming repositories with low-quality PRs is breaking the open contribution model. Solutions like Vouch (vouching for contributors) are emerging to combat AI slop.

entries.theme: AI lab consolidation and platform wars
entries.description: OpenAI acquires Astral (uv/Python tooling) for Codex; Microsoft threatens legal action over OpenAI/AWS deal; Cursor hikes prices silently. AI infrastructure and tooling is becoming a battleground.
